hallucinations.description: The paper describes a complex training pipeline including contrastive preference optimization (DPO), location-aware cross-entropy loss, contrastive representation learning with temperature-scaled cosine similarity, and continual self-evolution via gradient updates on new counterfactual pairs. None of these components exist in the provided source code, which implements only inference-time agents using a mock LLM and simple retry/reflection/counterfactual generation heuristics with no training, losses, or model updates.
hallucinations.evidence: Section 3.5 (Contrastive Alignment Training) defines L_DPO, L_contrast, L_location and L_total; Algorithm 1 and Section 3.6 describe continual learning via theta updates. In contrast, agents_realistic.py, counterfactual_generator.py, and run_experiment_final.py contain only generate_fix calls and test execution loops; no optimizer, loss functions, or training code appears anywhere.

hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite non-existent 2025 papers (e.g., Lavon et al. 2025, Vashishtha et al. 2025, Ghoummaid et al. 2025, Zhu et al. 2025, VISION 2025) with fabricated arXiv IDs that do not correspond to real publications.
hallucinations.evidence: References section lists entries 2,3,6,7,10 with 2025 dates and arXiv numbers such as arXiv:2506.10948, arXiv:2510.01539, arXiv:2509.10000.

hallucinations.description: The paper presents results from a deterministic mock-LLM simulation (with hand-crafted difficulty probabilities and bug-injection logic) as if they were obtained from real GPT-4o-mini API calls and genuine model training. The reported metrics, first-attempt success rates, and counterfactual statistics are artifacts of the mock rather than empirical outcomes.
hallucinations.evidence: llm_interface_realistic.py implements RealisticMockLLM with task_difficulty dict, failure_prob calculations, and _introduce_realistic_bug; experiment_results.json and log.txt contain exactly the numbers reported in Tables 1-6 and Figures 1-6.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations were found: the methodology section fabricates an entire training framework absent from the code, citations reference nonexistent papers, and experimental results are produced by a mock simulator rather than real execution. Severity is high because core technical claims are unsupported.
